name: Sweet Heat Hummus
headline: Dip-tastic! | 4 servings
description:
If you haven’t had the pleasure, allow us to introduce you to this creamy Middle Eastern dip! It’s made with chickpeas, tahini, garlic, and lemon juice—plus peppers and spices for a bit of heat. This dip tastes delicious with just about anything; spread it on sandwiches, serve alongside veggies for a snack, or use it as the base for a sauce.
Nutrition values are representative of a 2 TBSP serving
